# Kai App Rebuild v3 — Implementation Plan

**Date**: 2026-05-26
**Spec**: [docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-26-kai-app-rebuild-v3-design.md](../specs/2026-05-26-kai-app-rebuild-v3-design.md) (commit b5fef3b)
**Branch**: `claude/hungry-lamport-e41998` (worktree)
**Generated by**: sp-ultraplan after 6 parallel Explore agents

---

## 1 · Goal

Полная пересборка Flutter Kai app с нуля по утверждённому design spec — atomic layered build (tokens → atoms → molecules → organisms → screens) с параллельной backend lattice. v1 deliverable: рабочий iOS unsigned build с anonymous-session chat (onboarding → room → SSE streaming → edge states), iOS CI зелёный после каждой фазы.

---

## 2 · Architecture

Atomic Design + Clean Architecture в одном `lib/`. `design_system/` строго иерархичен (атомы не импортируют молекулы); `features/` композирует organisms; `core/` несёт routing/session/network/storage/repositories. Build идёт layer-by-layer (Approach B): на каждой Phase UI слой растёт вместе с соответствующим backend слоем, mock implementations Phase 4 → real implementations Phase 5. Главный trade-off: атомарный порядок добавляет 1-2 дополнительных commit cycle vs vertical slice, но защищает от regression повторов прошлого wipe — каждая Phase имеет independent visual showcase + exit gate (iOS CI green + tests added).

---

## 3 · File map (final state after Phase 6)

### `lib/` (new)
| File | Responsibility |
|---|---|
| `main.dart` | Entry, runApp(KaiApp) wrapped in UncontrolledProviderScope |
| `bootstrap.dart` | Async init: env, Hive (3 versioned boxes), font preload, session id, ProviderContainer |
| `app.dart` | MaterialApp.router + KaiTheme switching по settingsProvider |

### `lib/design_system/tokens/`
| File | Responsibility |
|---|---|
| `kai_tokens.dart` | Top-level KaiTokens record (exports all sub-tokens) |
| `kai_colors.dart` | `KaiColors.light()` / `.dark()` records (bg, surface, surface-2/3, ink-1..4, line, accent, positive, warning, negative + washes) |
| `kai_space.dart` | s1..s11 (4, 8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 32, 40, 56, 80, 120) |
| `kai_radius.dart` | r1..r5 + pill (6/10/14/20/28/999) |
| `kai_motion.dart` | Durations (standard 240/ambient 2600/micro 120) + curves (standard, ambient, exit, linear) |
| `kai_type.dart` | TextStyle factories: hero/display/h1..h3/lead/body/small/micro/mono |
| `kai_tide.dart` | Tide gradient stops + 8 state configs (theme-independent) |

### `lib/design_system/theme/`
| File | Responsibility |
|---|---|
| `kai_theme.dart` | InheritedWidget exposing resolved KaiTokens for current ThemeMode |
| `kai_theme_ext.dart` | Material `ThemeExtension` bridge so Material widgets get correct colors |

### `lib/design_system/atoms/`
| File | Responsibility |
|---|---|
| `kai_text.dart` | Typed factory: `KaiText.hero(...) / .h1(...) / .body(...) / .micro(...) / .mono(...)` |
| `kai_icon.dart` | SVG icon system via flutter_svg, asset id lookup |
| `kai_button.dart` | 4 variants: `.tide()` / `.ink1()` / `.ghost()` / `.icon()` + send sub-widget (ready/disabled/sending/streaming) |
| `kai_input.dart` | KaiTextField (single + multiline), pill radius variant |
| `kai_bubble.dart` | 3 variants (user surface-2 / kai bg / system inline) + markdown via flutter_markdown |
| `kai_tide_curve.dart` | CustomPainter, 8 states, SVG path `M 0 14 Q 60 8 120 14 T 240 12`, viewBox 240×28, gradient stroke |

### `lib/design_system/molecules/`
| File | Responsibility |
|---|---|
| `compose_island.dart` | Pill input + mic toggle (left edge) + send button (right edge), KaiButton.send state |
| `nav_item.dart` | Drawer row (icon + text + badge/dot), active state (accent-wash + border-left) |
| `source_card.dart` | Index badge + URL (mono) + timestamp + freshness icon |
| `alert_card.dart` | N-01 — 4 types (urgent/warning/positive/neutral) |
| `care_block.dart` | Crisis C3 left-border, warm coral, heart icon, 2 actions |

### `lib/design_system/organisms/`
| File | Responsibility |
|---|---|
| `onboarding_card.dart` | 4-step wizard card scaffold (welcome/tide/gestures/context) |
| `chat_list.dart` | State-driven 6-frame rendering (empty/live/panel/compose/streaming/error) |
| `nav_panel.dart` | Full-screen swipe-from-left drawer; trips/dates/apps/account |
| `edge_state_block.dart` | Composable 4-surface (offline/error/rate-limit/crisis-in-conversation) |

### `lib/features/`
| File | Responsibility |
|---|---|
| `onboarding/onboarding_screen.dart` | 4-step PageView, dots progress, "onboarded=true" persistence |
| `room/room_screen.dart` | Chat screen — composes ChatList + ComposeIsland, drives via RoomState |
| `room/room_state.dart` | Riverpod notifier (@keepAlive), frame state machine + tide state |
| `nav/nav_screen.dart` | Side panel host, swipe gesture coordination |
| `dev/theme_showcase_screen.dart` | Phase 1 visual demo |
| `dev/atoms_showcase_screen.dart` | Phase 2 visual demo |
| `dev/molecules_showcase_screen.dart` | Phase 3 visual demo |
| `dev/organisms_showcase_screen.dart` | Phase 4 visual demo |

### `lib/core/`
| File | Responsibility |
|---|---|
| `routing/router.dart` | go_router config: `/` bootstrap redirect, `/onboarding`, `/room`, `/room/:tripId` |
| `session/anonymous_session_provider.dart` | `@Riverpod(keepAlive: true)` — device-uuid in flutter_secure_storage |
| `network/dio_client.dart` | Dio factory, base URL from .env, interceptor chain wiring |
| `network/interceptors/auth_interceptor.dart` | X-Anonymous-Session header injection |
| `network/interceptors/logging_interceptor.dart` | Correlation IDs, debug-only logs |
| `network/interceptors/retry_interceptor.dart` | Exp backoff max 3, skip 401/403/429 |
| `network/interceptors/connectivity_interceptor.dart` | Connectivity_plus listener, offline early-fail |
| `network/interceptors/error_interceptor.dart` | Normalize errors to typed failure |
| `network/sse_parser.dart` | UTF-8 line splitter, parse 8 event types |
| `storage/hive_setup.dart` | Open 3 versioned boxes; register adapters |
| `storage/entities/session.dart` | Freezed + Hive adapter, id/title/createdAt/tripId? |
| `storage/entities/message.dart` | Freezed + Hive adapter; status enum (sending/sent/error/failed/streaming) |
| `storage/entities/settings.dart` | Freezed + Hive adapter; themeMode/locale/onboarded |
| `repositories/chat_repository.dart` | Abstract `Stream<ChatEvent> sendMessage(...)` + cancel; ChatEvent sealed (8 variants) |
| `repositories/mock_chat_repository.dart` | In-memory + faked streaming with delays |
| `repositories/real_chat_repository.dart` | Dio + SSE parser; 8 legacy patterns baked in |
| `repositories/session_repository.dart` | Abstract list/create/delete |
| `repositories/mock_session_repository.dart` | In-memory |
| `repositories/real_session_repository.dart` | Hive-backed |
| `providers/root.dart` | Riverpod root providers, mock-or-real switch |

### `lib/l10n/`
| File | Responsibility |
|---|---|
| `app_en.arb` | English strings (Phase 6) |
| `app_ru.arb` | Russian strings (Phase 6) |
| `l10n.yaml` | Flutter localizations config |

### `test/` (new — wiped at Phase 0)
| File | Responsibility |
|---|---|
| `test_helpers.dart` | `buildTestWidget(ProviderScope + KaiTheme + Localizations)` |
| `design_system/tokens_test.dart` | Token values match design-tokens.json |
| `design_system/theme_test.dart` | ThemeMode switching |
| `design_system/atoms/*_test.dart` | Per-atom widget + golden (light + dark) |
| `design_system/atoms/kai_tide_curve_test.dart` | All 8 states golden, pixel tolerance 0.02 |
| `design_system/molecules/*_test.dart` | Per-molecule widget behavior + golden |
| `design_system/organisms/*_test.dart` | Per-organism integration (state, gestures) |
| `features/onboarding_test.dart` | Full 4-step scenario |
| `features/room_test.dart` | Send-message scenario |
| `features/edge_states_test.dart` | Offline / rate-limit / error / crisis |
| `features/tide_states_test.dart` | State transitions |
| `core/session_test.dart` | Device-uuid generate + persist + read |
| `core/storage_test.dart` | Open/save/read/delete per box |
| `core/storage/migration_test.dart` | Scaffold for future version bumps |
| `core/sse_pipeline_test.dart` | Regression suite — 8 legacy patterns (T8-T37) |

### Assets
| Path | Content |
|---|---|
| `assets/fonts/Manrope.ttf` | Variable font 300-800, renamed from `Manrope-VariableFont_wght.ttf` |
| `assets/fonts/JetBrainsMono.ttf` | Variable font, renamed |
| `assets/icons/*.svg` | 14 icons: arrow-up, mic, plus, chev, person, settings, send, close, search, menu, retry, alert, heart, copy |
| `.env` (gitignored) | API_BASE_URL, anonymous flag |
| `.env.example` | Tracked template |

### Modified (NOT created)
| File | Change |
|---|---|
| `pubspec.yaml` | Remove `google_fonts` and `shimmer` (unused in v1); add `flutter_dotenv`, `flutter_svg`; register fonts + assets |
| `ios/Runner/Info.plist` | Remove `NSMicrophoneUsageDescription` (voice not in v1) |
| `analysis_options.yaml` | Keep as-is (already aligned: prefer_single_quotes, omit_local_variable_types) |
| `.gitignore` | Add `.env` |

### LOCKED (NEVER touch)
- `ios/Runner.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj`
- `.github/workflows/ios_build.yml`
- `android/`, `web/`, `windows/`, `macos/`, `linux/`
- `master` branch
- `new-design/` (read-only source of truth)

---

## 4 · Build sequence — 134 tasks across Phase 0 + 6 phases

Each task ~2-5 min. Phase exit gates: iOS CI green + tests added + local tag `phase-N-<name>` (NO push to origin until v1 complete).

### Phase 0 — Wipe (target: clean slate, iOS CI green on empty shell)
- **T0.1** `git rm -rf lib/ test/`
- **T0.2** Scaffold `lib/main.dart` — `runApp(MaterialApp(home: Scaffold()))`, blank
- **T0.3** Scaffold `lib/bootstrap.dart` — empty async `Future<ProviderContainer> bootstrap()`
- **T0.4** Scaffold `lib/app.dart` — minimal MaterialApp + empty Scaffold
- **T0.5** Edit `ios/Runner/Info.plist` — remove `NSMicrophoneUsageDescription` key+value
- **T0.6** Edit `pubspec.yaml` — remove `google_fonts`, `shimmer`; add `flutter_dotenv: ^5.1.0`, `flutter_svg: ^2.0.10`
- **T0.7** `flutter pub get`
- **T0.8** Create `assets/fonts/.gitkeep`, `assets/icons/.gitkeep`
- **T0.9** Add `.env` to `.gitignore`; create `.env.example`
- **T0.10** Local iOS build smoke (`flutter build ios --no-codesign`)
- **T0.11** Commit: `phase-0: wipe lib/ + scaffold blank shell`
- **T0.12** Push branch, watch iOS CI run, verify green
- **T0.13** Local tag `phase-0-wipe`

### Phase 1 — Foundation (tokens + theme + fonts + Dio skeleton)
- **T1.1** Download Manrope variable TTF; rename to `Manrope.ttf`; place в `assets/fonts/`
- **T1.2** Download JetBrainsMono variable TTF; rename to `JetBrainsMono.ttf`; place в `assets/fonts/`
- **T1.3** Register both fonts в `pubspec.yaml` с weight ranges 300-800
- **T1.4** Write `lib/design_system/tokens/kai_colors.dart` — Light + Dark records со всеми значениями из design-tokens.json
- **T1.5** Write `lib/design_system/tokens/kai_space.dart` — s1..s11
- **T1.6** Write `lib/design_system/tokens/kai_radius.dart` — r1..r5 + pill, BorderRadius helpers
- **T1.7** Write `lib/design_system/tokens/kai_motion.dart` — Duration constants + Curve constants
- **T1.8** Write `lib/design_system/tokens/kai_type.dart` — TextStyle factory functions
- **T1.9** Write `lib/design_system/tokens/kai_tide.dart` — LinearGradient (115deg, 3 stops) + 8 state configs (struct per state: stroke width, color, opacity, animation type, duration, dash, ephemeral)
- **T1.10** Write `lib/design_system/tokens/kai_tokens.dart` — KaiTokens record composing все sub-tokens
- **T1.11** Write `lib/design_system/theme/kai_theme.dart` — InheritedWidget + ThemeMode resolution
- **T1.12** Write `lib/design_system/theme/kai_theme_ext.dart` — Material ThemeExtension bridge
- **T1.13** Update `lib/bootstrap.dart` — load .env, init ProviderContainer
- **T1.14** Write `lib/core/network/dio_client.dart` — Dio factory с base URL placeholder
- **T1.15** Write `lib/core/network/interceptors/auth_interceptor.dart` — placeholder (returns immediately)
- **T1.16** Write `lib/core/network/interceptors/logging_interceptor.dart` — correlation IDs, conditional on dev mode
- **T1.17** Write `lib/core/network/interceptors/retry_interceptor.dart` — exp backoff, skip 401/403/429
- **T1.18** Write `lib/core/network/interceptors/connectivity_interceptor.dart` — connectivity_plus check
- **T1.19** Write `lib/core/network/interceptors/error_interceptor.dart` — typed failures
- **T1.20** Write `lib/core/providers/root.dart` — root Riverpod providers (dio, env)
- **T1.21** Write `lib/core/routing/router.dart` — go_router stub with single `/` route → theme_showcase
- **T1.22** Update `lib/app.dart` — `MaterialApp.router` с KaiTheme
- **T1.23** Write `lib/features/dev/theme_showcase_screen.dart` — visual showcase всех tokens с light/dark toggle
- **T1.24** Write `test/design_system/tokens_test.dart` — assert values match constants
- **T1.25** Write `test/design_system/theme_test.dart` — ThemeMode switching
- **T1.26** `flutter test`
- **T1.27** Commit: `phase-1: foundation (tokens, theme, fonts, dio skeleton)`
- **T1.28** Push, watch iOS CI, verify green
- **T1.29** Local tag `phase-1-foundation`

### Phase 2 — Atoms (KaiButton, KaiInput, KaiBubble, KaiTideCurve, KaiIcon, KaiText) + Anonymous session
- **T2.1** Write `lib/design_system/atoms/kai_text.dart` — typed factory (.hero, .display, .h1..h3, .lead, .body, .small, .micro, .mono)
- **T2.2** Write `test/design_system/atoms/kai_text_test.dart`
- **T2.3** Add 14 SVG icons в `assets/icons/` (arrow-up, mic, plus, chev, person, settings, send, close, search, menu, retry, alert, heart, copy)
- **T2.4** Register `assets/icons/` в `pubspec.yaml`
- **T2.5** Write `lib/design_system/atoms/kai_icon.dart` — flutter_svg wrapper + asset id enum
- **T2.6** Write `test/design_system/atoms/kai_icon_test.dart`
- **T2.7** Write `lib/design_system/atoms/kai_button.dart` — 4 variants
- **T2.8** Add `KaiButton.send` sub-widget — 4 states (ready/disabled/sending/streaming) с micro pulse
- **T2.9** Write `test/design_system/atoms/kai_button_test.dart` — interaction + golden (light + dark)
- **T2.10** Write `lib/design_system/atoms/kai_input.dart` — KaiTextField (single + multiline + pill variant)
- **T2.11** Write `test/design_system/atoms/kai_input_test.dart`
- **T2.12** Write `lib/design_system/atoms/kai_bubble.dart` — 3 variants + flutter_markdown integration для kai variant
- **T2.13** Write `test/design_system/atoms/kai_bubble_test.dart` — golden per variant
- **T2.14** Write `lib/design_system/atoms/kai_tide_curve.dart` — CustomPainter scaffold, TideState enum
- **T2.15** Implement SVG path `M 0 14 Q 60 8 120 14 T 240 12` через Path.quadraticBezierTo
- **T2.16** Implement viewBox transform (240×28 → widget size)
- **T2.17** Implement gradient stroke (LinearGradient 115deg, 3 stops + strokeCap.round)
- **T2.18** Implement idle paint (1.5px ink-4 @0.4, breathe 5.5s per HTML canon — JSON null, HTML wins)
- **T2.19** Implement sleep paint (1px ink-4 @0.2, breathe 7s per HTML canon)
- **T2.20** Implement listening paint (2px tide gradient @0.8, bob 2200ms ambient)
- **T2.21** Implement thinking paint (2px gradient dash `6 4`, flow R→L 3000ms linear, stroke-dashoffset 0→-40)
- **T2.22** Implement responding paint (2.5px gradient dash `12 4`, stream R→L 1400ms, dashoffset 0→-32)
- **T2.23** Implement success ephemeral (2.5px success gradient, flash 1200ms ease-out, auto-revert to previous)
- **T2.24** Implement error ephemeral (2px coral `#C44A3C`, wobble 700ms × 2 with 1s delay, translateX ±6/4px)
- **T2.25** Implement memory ephemeral (2px gradient, pop 900ms ease-out, 0.5s delay)
- **T2.26** Add `MediaQuery.disableAnimationsOf(context)` check (fall back to static)
- **T2.27** Write `test/design_system/atoms/kai_tide_curve_test.dart` — golden per state, pixel tolerance 0.02
- **T2.28** Write `lib/core/session/anonymous_session_provider.dart` с `@Riverpod(keepAlive: true)` — device-uuid (uuid package) + flutter_secure_storage persistence
- **T2.29** Run `dart run build_runner build` (for @Riverpod codegen)
- **T2.30** Write `test/core/session_test.dart` — generate/persist/read scenarios
- **T2.31** Write `lib/features/dev/atoms_showcase_screen.dart` — visual demo всех atoms
- **T2.32** Update router — добавить `/_dev/atoms` route
- **T2.33** `flutter test`
- **T2.34** Commit: `phase-2: atoms + anonymous session`
- **T2.35** Push, watch iOS CI, verify green
- **T2.36** Local tag `phase-2-atoms`

### Phase 3 — Molecules + Storage
- **T3.1** Write `lib/design_system/molecules/compose_island.dart` — pill input + mic toggle (hugs LEFT) + send button (hugs RIGHT)
- **T3.2** Wire KaiButton.send state management in ComposeIsland (text→ready, empty→disabled, streaming→sending)
- **T3.3** Write `test/design_system/molecules/compose_island_test.dart` — keyboard, state, golden
- **T3.4** Write `lib/design_system/molecules/nav_item.dart` — icon + text + badge/dot + active state
- **T3.5** Write `test/design_system/molecules/nav_item_test.dart`
- **T3.6** Write `lib/design_system/molecules/source_card.dart` — index badge + URL + timestamp + freshness icon

- **T3.10** Write `lib/design_system/molecules/care_block.dart` — crisis C3 left-border `#C44A3C`, heart SVG icon
- **T3.11** Write `test/design_system/molecules/care_block_test.dart`
- **T3.12** Write `lib/core/storage/entities/session.dart` — freezed model + HiveType adapter (typeId 0)
- **T3.13** Write `lib/core/storage/entities/message.dart` — freezed + HiveType (typeId 1); MessageStatus enum HiveType (typeId 2)
- **T3.14** Write `lib/core/storage/entities/settings.dart` — freezed + HiveType (typeId 3)
- **T3.15** Run `dart run build_runner build` — generate freezed + hive adapters
- **T3.16** Write `lib/core/storage/hive_setup.dart` — Hive.initFlutter + register adapters + openBoxes('chat_sessions_v1', 'messages_v1', 'settings_v1')
- **T3.17** Update `bootstrap.dart` — вызов hive_setup
- **T3.18** Write `test/core/storage_test.dart` — open/save/read/delete per box
- **T3.19** Write `test/core/storage/migration_test.dart` — scaffold (no migrations yet but pattern ready)
- **T3.20** Write `lib/features/dev/molecules_showcase_screen.dart` — visual demo molecules
- **T3.21** Update router — добавить `/_dev/molecules`
- **T3.22** `flutter test`
- **T3.23** Commit: `phase-3: molecules + storage`
- **T3.24** Push, watch iOS CI, verify green
- **T3.25** Local tag `phase-3-molecules`

- **T4.2** Implement welcome content (Kai glyph 64px gradient + title + subtitle)

### Phase 5 — Screens + Real backend (largest phase)
- **T5.1** Write `lib/features/room/room_state.dart` — Riverpod notifier with `@Riverpod(keepAlive: true)`
- **T5.2** Define RoomState fields: messages, currentFrame, tideState, isStreaming, cancelCompleter
- **T5.3** Write `lib/features/room/room_screen.dart` — composes ChatList + ComposeIsland
- **T5.4** Wire ChatList frame selection to RoomState.currentFrame
- **T5.5** Wire ComposeIsland send action → RoomState.sendMessage
- **T5.6** Wire RoomState.tideState → KaiTideCurve at top
- **T5.7** Write `test/features/room_test.dart` — empty → live → streaming → live transitions
- **T5.8** Write `lib/features/onboarding/onboarding_screen.dart` — PageView с 4 OnboardingCard pages
- **T5.9** Implement dots progress indicator
- **T5.10** Implement step advance (continue button → next page)
- **T5.11** On step 4 final CTA → save settings.onboarded=true → navigate to /room
- **T5.12** Write `test/features/onboarding_test.dart` — full flow scenario
- **T5.13** Write `lib/features/nav/nav_screen.dart` — modal route с swipe gesture host
- **T5.14** Wire trip/chat selection в NavPanel → RoomState.switchSession + close panel
- **T5.15** Update router — `/`, `/onboarding`, `/room`, `/room/:tripId`
- **T5.16** Implement bootstrap redirect — check `settings.onboarded` flag
- **T5.17** Implement side panel modal route с custom transition
- **T5.18** Write `lib/core/network/sse_parser.dart` — UTF-8 line splitter + event parser (8 types)
- **T5.19** Write `test/core/sse_parser_test.dart`
- **T5.20** Write `lib/core/repositories/real_chat_repository.dart` — implements ChatRepository
- **T5.21** Implement sendMessage opening Dio stream (`/chat/stream` endpoint)
- **T5.22** Implement event mapping: SSE line → ChatEvent
- **T5.23** Bake T8 pattern — optimistic persist-then-stream (save user msg before stream)
- **T5.24** Bake T35 pattern — cancel-aware drain via Future.any([delay, cancelCompleter.future])
- **T5.25** Bake T27 pattern — session-switch guard (check sessionId vs current in onUpdate)
- **T5.26** Bake T36 pattern — microtask yield after state event для cognitive status queue
- **T5.27** Bake T21 pattern — correction event REPLACES content (not appends)
- **T5.28** Bake T33 pattern — `_safelyPersistMessages` с per-message try/catch
- **T5.29** Bake T32 pattern — stream-started guard (only persist if content.isNotEmpty || cogStepCount > 0)
- **T5.30** Bake T34 pattern — emit failedUserMessage via onUpdate before responseMessage
- **T5.31** Add Completer guards везде: `if (!c.isCompleted) c.complete(...)`
- **T5.32** Add T30 pattern — error/done events terminate SSE stream cleanly
- **T5.33** Write `test/core/sse_pipeline_test.dart` — regression suite (8 patterns × test each)
- **T5.34** Write `lib/core/repositories/real_session_repository.dart` — Hive-backed
- **T5.35** Write `test/core/real_session_repository_test.dart`
- **T5.36** Update `lib/core/providers/root.dart` — switch mock→real providers via env flag (allow toggle during testing)
- **T5.37** Smoke test — boot → onboarding → room → send → receive (locally на симуляторе)
- **T5.38** `flutter test`
- **T5.39** Commit: `phase-5: screens + real backend`
- **T5.40** Push, watch iOS CI, verify green
- **T5.41** Local tag `phase-5-screens`

### Phase 6 — Edge states + polish (final phase)
- **T6.1** Add `lib/core/network/connectivity_listener.dart` — connectivity_plus stream → providers
- **T6.2** Wire offline detection в RoomState — set frame to live с EdgeStateBlock(offline) inline
- **T6.3** Implement rate-limit (429) handling в real_chat_repository — emit rate-limit event
- **T6.4** Wire rate-limit edge surface — disable compose, show countdown
- **T6.5** Implement error edge surface routing — emit on stream failure
- **T6.6** Implement crisis pattern detection — backend signals via `.metadata` event field (e.g., `crisis: true`)
- **T6.7** Wire crisis → CareBlock in Kai bubble + EdgeStateBlock(crisis) inline (muted gray @0.3 tide)
- **T6.8** Wire tide state transitions to RoomState: idle (no streaming), listening (ComposeIsland.mic active), thinking (Dio request pending), responding (stream active), error (terminated abnormally)
- **T6.9** Add success ephemeral trigger — on responding→done complete (1200ms flash then revert)
- **T6.10** Add memory ephemeral trigger — on `.metadata` event with memory_saved=true (900ms pop)
- **T6.11** Add 60s inactivity timer в RoomState → switch tide to sleep
- **T6.12** Write `test/features/edge_states_test.dart` — all 4 surfaces scenarios
- **T6.13** Write `test/features/tide_states_test.dart` — all 8 state transitions
- **T6.14** Setup `lib/l10n/l10n.yaml` + ARB files (app_en.arb, app_ru.arb)
- **T6.15** Replace hardcoded UI strings с AppLocalizations
- **T6.16** Add `flutter_localizations` + `intl` references in pubspec (already there)
- **T6.17** Generate localizations (`flutter gen-l10n`)
- **T6.18** Add placeholder telemetry hook в core/providers/root.dart — `TelemetryService` interface, NoOp impl
- **T6.19** Code review pass: lints clean, no print statements, no unused imports, no dead code
- **T6.20** Final iOS simulator smoke — onboarding → 4 steps → /room → send → receive → swipe nav → switch trip → offline → reconnect
- **T6.21** Update root `CLAUDE.md` если нужно (likely no — iOS CI правила сохраняются)
- **T6.22** `flutter test --coverage`; verify thresholds (70% design_system, 60% features, 80% core/repositories)
- **T6.23** Commit: `phase-6: edge states + polish — v1 complete`
- **T6.24** Push, watch iOS CI, verify green
- **T6.25** Local tag `phase-6-v1-complete`
- **T6.26** Wait for user approval before PR to master

---

## 5 · Risks & open questions

### Risks (mitigations baked into tasks)
| Risk | Mitigation in plan |
|---|---|
| iOS CI breaks at Phase 0 wipe | T0.10 local build smoke + T0.12 CI check immediately |
| build_runner failure on freezed/hive | T1.X tasks scope code-gen explicitly; analysis_options unchanged |
| Manrope variable TTF tooling failure | T1.1/1.2 rename mandatory (memory lesson) |
| `--delete-conflicting-outputs` deprecated warning | Keep in CI as-is (build_runner 2.4.11 still supports); use plain command locally |
| Tide curve visual canon split (HTML vs JSON) | T2.18/2.19 explicit — implement HTML breathe for idle/sleep regardless of JSON null |
| SSE pipeline regression (re-introducing T8-T37 bugs) | T5.33 regression suite is mandatory exit gate for Phase 5 |
| Riverpod 3 autoDispose collision with singleton state | All long-lived providers use `@Riverpod(keepAlive: true)` annotations (T2.28, T5.1, etc.) |
| Tag push to origin causes another wipe scenario | NO tag push в build sequence (explicit `Local tag` only) — push only on user-confirmed v1 complete |
| Voice mic permission left over confusing Apple | T0.5 explicit Info.plist edit |
| Bundle ID `com.wize.kai` accidentally changed | Not in our touched files; locked |

### Open questions (none blocking)
1. **`.env` template values** — endpoint URLs для dev/staging. Будет уточнено в T1.13. Если пользователь не дёрнет — оставлю placeholder `https://api.wize.travel`.
2. **14 SVG icons sourcing** — взять из new-design/ HTML SVG sprites, или генерировать через design tool. T2.3 — extract from HTML inline SVG (предпочтительно).
3. **Hive typeId ranges** — 0/1/2/3 для Session/Message/MessageStatus/Settings. Зарезервированы; будущие расширения от 4.

---

## 6 · Acceptance criteria

v1 готов когда:

1. **Functional**:
   - Boot → onboarding (first run only) → 4 steps → /room
   - Room: send message → see streaming response with tide responding state → receive done → tide success flash → tide idle
   - Cancel mid-stream → message status=error, tide error wobble, user msg status=failed
   - Swipe-from-left → NavPanel opens full-screen → tap trip → switch session → panel closes
   - Offline → EdgeStateBlock inline + user msg queued; reconnect → retry
   - Rate-limit (mock 429) → compose disabled + countdown + plans CTA
   - Crisis trigger (mock metadata flag) → CareBlock в Kai reply

2. **Tests**:
   - `flutter test` passes all
   - Coverage: design_system ≥70%, features ≥60%, core/repositories ≥80%
   - SSE regression suite: 8 patterns × cases all pass

3. **CI**:
   - iOS unsigned build artifact generated on master branch (after PR merge)
   - All 6 phase commits had green CI

4. **Design fidelity**:
   - Light + dark themes both functional
   - Tide curve 8 states match HTML visual canon
   - One primary action per screen (manual review)
   - No persistent chrome (no bottom tabs, no top nav bar)
   - Compose-island pill with hugged-edge buttons
   - Errors use coral `#C44A3C`, never red

5. **Lock-list intact**:
   - `ios/Runner.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj` — only DEVELOPMENT_TEAM=PLACEHOLDER preserved
   - `.github/workflows/ios_build.yml` — unchanged
   - `master` branch — unchanged until merge approval

---

## 7 · Execution mode

After approval — handoff to `superpowers:subagent-driven-development` (same session, sequential phases, each phase = fresh subagent per major task group with review checkpoints between phases). Alternative `superpowers:executing-plans` для separate-session execution. Не push tags в origin; не merge в master до явного approve пользователем.
